# Oforo AI

> Oforo is an AI platform that provides multi-model chat, voice interaction, canvas whiteboard, and collaborative tools. Built by Oforo AI (a Wartens subsidiary) based in Milton Keynes, UK and Bangalore, India.

## What is Oforo AI?

Oforo AI is an intelligent chat platform that gives users access to 8+ AI models (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, Gemini Flash, DeepSeek V3, Llama, Mistral) through a single interface. Unlike other AI chat tools, Oforo features Auto Model Routing that automatically picks the best model for each query, and Side-by-Side Comparison that lets users compare responses from multiple models simultaneously.

## Core Features

- **Auto Model Routing**: Automatically selects the best AI model based on the user's query (code goes to Claude, math to DeepSeek, creative tasks to GPT).
- **Side-by-Side Model Comparison**: Compare responses from 2-3 AI models at once for the same prompt.
- **Voice Mode**: Speak to AI naturally with speech-to-text and text-to-speech.
- **Canvas Whiteboard**: Draw diagrams, mind maps, and flowcharts. AI-generated Mermaid diagrams render automatically.
- **Web Search Integration**: Toggle real-time web search to ground AI responses with current data and cited sources.
- **Task Hub & Scheduler**: AI detects tasks from conversations and schedules daily automated queries.
- **Local File Browser**: Browse local file system and analyze files from the chat.
- **Personalized Learning**: Oforo learns user interests, knowledge level, and preferred response style.
- **Import from ChatGPT**: Import existing ChatGPT conversation history.
- **Friends & Collaboration**: Add friends, share chat threads, co-edit whiteboards, and message within the platform.
- **Multi-Language Support**: Responses in 20+ languages including Spanish, French, German, Hindi, and Malayalam.
- **File & Image Analysis**: Upload PDFs, CSVs, images, and documents for AI analysis.

## Model Tiers

- **Free**: Llama 3.3 70B, Mistral Small (open-source, unlimited)
- **Mini**: Gemini 2.0 Flash, DeepSeek V3 (fast, capable)
- **Pro**: GPT-4o Mini, Claude Sonnet 4 (premium)
- **Max**: GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4, full collaboration suite (most powerful)

## Products

- **LADX** (ladx.ai): AI for industrial automation, PLC programming, and manufacturing
- **SEEKOF** (seekof.cloud): AI tool discovery platform
- **nxtED** (nxted.ai): Career development and skill guidance AI

## Company

- **Website**: https://oforo.ai
- **Parent Company**: Wartens
- **Locations**: Milton Keynes, UK & Bangalore, India
- **Contact**: https://oforo.ai/contact
